entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: A dry season food legume grown on residual soil moisture, susceptible to terminal drought and heat stress.

entities.name: TERMINAL DROUGHT
entities.description: Moisture stress occurring towards the end of the crop season.

entities.name: HEAT STRESS
entities.description: Stress occurring at the reproductive stage, often exacerbated by delayed sowing.

entities.name: CLIMATE VARIABILITY
entities.description: Wide fluctuations in temperatures and rainfall that aggravate drought and heat stresses.

entities.name: SEMI-ARID TROPICS
entities.description: Regions characterized by specific climatic conditions where chickpea is cultivated.

entities.name: EARLY MATURITY
entities.description: A genetic trait developed to manage terminal drought and heat stresses.

entities.name: STRESS TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to withstand adverse conditions like drought and heat.

entities.name: HIGH YIELD POTENTIAL
entities.description: The capacity of a variety to produce high yields, especially in short-season environments.

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The total weight of grain produced, used as a selection criterion for drought tolerance.

entities.name: POD SET
entities.description: The process of pod formation, used as a selection criterion for heat tolerance.

entities.name: QTL-HOT SPOT
entities.description: A genomic region that controls multiple drought tolerance traits, including root traits.

entities.name: ROOT TRAITS
entities.description: Characteristics of the root system controlled by the QTL-hot spot to improve drought tolerance.

entities.name: MARKER-ASSISTED BACKCROSSING
entities.description: A breeding method used to introgress specific genomic regions like the QTL-hot spot into cultivars.

entities.name: MULTI-PARENT ADVANCED GENERATION INTER-CROSS
entities.description: A breeding approach used to enhance genetic recombination and develop stress-tolerant lines.

entities.name: GENOMIC TOOLS
entities.description: Molecular tools used in integrated breeding to improve the efficiency of developing adapted varieties.

entities.name: PRECISION PHENOTYPING
entities.description: High-accuracy measurement of plant traits used to improve breeding efficiency.

entities.name: RAPID GENERATION TURNOVER TECHNIQUES
entities.description: Techniques used to accelerate the breeding cycle and improve efficiency.

entities.name: WATER LIMITED ENVIRONMENTS
entities.description: Environments where water availability is insufficient for optimal crop growth.
